hold_reason: CBOE public daily-history endpoints for VIX, VIX3M, VIX9D, and VVIX were reachable, but Alpaca/qfa real ETF daily bars could not be accessed because ALPACA_API_KEY and ALPACA_SECRET_KEY were not configured. A CSV-backed ETF price backtest is forbidden, so no performance evaluation was run.
unblock_condition: Configure approved Alpaca/qfa real ETF daily bar access, then rerun AR-145 with no --data-csv, one-session-lagged CBOE features, 10 bps primary turnover cost, 5/20 bps sensitivity, required controls, and compact artifacts only.

minimum_needed_before_performance: Approved Alpaca/qfa real ETF daily bar access for SPY, QQQ, IWM, HYG, LQD, TLT, IEF, GLD, and SHY.

Evaluator that downloads CBOE daily histories transiently or through an approved cache outside durable artifacts, computes VIX3M/VIX, VIX9D/VIX, VIX and VVIX percentiles, and applies at least one completed trading-session lag.
Costed random-window and stress/regime-slice framework with 10 bps primary one-way turnover cost and 5/20 bps sensitivities.
Controls versus simple VIX level, term-slope-only, no-VVIX, ETF TSMOM/reversal, shifted labels, and prior defensive/carry/stress family retained streams.
